feature: Phase 2 foundation: BaselineSnapshot dataclass and per-file SignalCache key for incremental analysis
evidence: 13 new tests in tests/test_incremental.py: TestContentHashForFile (2 tests) verifies per-file cache key identity and uniqueness. TestBaselineSnapshot (11 tests) covers TTL validation, changed-files detection (added/removed/modified/mixed), all_changed union, score storage, default TTL, empty baseline edge case. Full regression suite: 1236 passed, 2 skipped.

signal_cache.impact: Added SignalCache.content_hash_for_file() static method for per-file cache keys, enabling file-local signal caching without full-repo hash

baseline_snapshot.impact: New BaselineSnapshot dataclass with TTL validation, file-hash diffing (added/removed/modified), and composite score storage — foundation for incremental signal analysis

test_coverage.impact: 13 new tests covering all BaselineSnapshot and per-file cache key functionality
